---
title: "Comparison Report: Brain/MB"
author: "Ali Al-Timimi, PhD"
format: html
params:
  data_file: "C:/Users/drziy/OneDrive/Desktop/Ali/scientific_research_current/global-cancer-complexity/output/global_cancer/RData/comparison_data/comparison_data_brain_mb.rds"
execute:
  eval: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(glue)
library(purrr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

if (is.null(params$data_file) || !file.exists(params$data_file)) {
  stop("Please provide a valid 'data_file' parameter pointing to an existing RDS file")
}

comp_data <- readRDS(params$data_file)

# load latent space data
latent_path <- here::here("latent-space", "tables", "latent_comparison_metrics.csv")

if (!file.exists(latent_path)) {

  warning("Latent metrics file not found; latent geometry section will be skipped.")

  latent_tbl <- NULL

} else {

  latent_tbl <- read_csv(
    latent_path,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )

}

comparison     <- comp_data$comparison
summaries_df   <- comp_data$summaries_df
complexity_df  <- comp_data$complexity_df
entropy_df     <- comp_data$entropy_df
res_35k        <- comp_data$res_35k
res_6800       <- comp_data$res_6800

count_35k <- comp_data$count_35k
count_6800 <- comp_data$count_6800

# ---- Overview-summary mode normalization ----
# The reporting template uses broad display categories, while the analysis
# pipeline may emit more specific mode labels. These mappings prevent empty
# overview cells when the upstream schema uses GO_MF, GO_BP, MSIG, or unknown.
# MODE_MAP <- list(
#   ALL      = c("FULL", "ALL", "unknown"),
#   GO_MF    = c("GO_MF", "GO", "GO_UNSPECIFIED"),
#   KEGG     = c("KEGG"),
#   HALLMARK = c("MSIG", "HALLMARK")
# )

MODE_MAP <- list(
  ALL      = c("FULL", "ALL"),
  GO_MF    = c("GO_MF"),
  KEGG     = c("KEGG"),
  HALLMARK = c("MSIG", "HALLMARK")
)

first_nonempty <- function(x, fallback = "not available") {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & trimws(as.character(x)) != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) fallback else as.character(x[[1]])
}

get_summary_subset <- function(df, modes) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || !("mode" %in% names(df))) {
    return(df[0, , drop = FALSE])
  }
  df %>% dplyr::filter(.data$mode %in% modes)
}

fmt_summary <- function(df, strength_col, confidence_col) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    return("not available")
  }

  if (!(strength_col %in% names(df)) || !(confidence_col %in% names(df))) {
    return("not available")
  }

  strength <- first_nonempty(df[[strength_col]])
  confidence <- first_nonempty(df[[confidence_col]])

  if (identical(strength, "not available") && identical(confidence, "not available")) {
    return("not available")
  }

  if (identical(confidence, "not available")) {
    return(strength)
  }

  paste0(strength, " (", confidence, ")")
}

summary_all  <- get_summary_subset(summaries_df, MODE_MAP$ALL)
summary_go   <- get_summary_subset(summaries_df, MODE_MAP$GO_MF)
summary_kegg <- get_summary_subset(summaries_df, MODE_MAP$KEGG)
summary_msig <- get_summary_subset(summaries_df, MODE_MAP$HALLMARK)

cancer_category_label <- first_nonempty(summaries_df$cancer_category)

available_modes <- sort(unique(summaries_df$mode))
message("[REPORT] Available summary modes for ", comparison, ": ", paste(available_modes, collapse = ", "))

if (nrow(summary_all) == 0) {
  warning("No all-probe summary row found for comparison: ", comparison)
}
if (nrow(summary_go) == 0) {
  warning("No GO Molecular Function summary row found for comparison: ", comparison)
}

# Cleaned name for image file references
clean_name <- gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "_", tolower(comparison))

plot_base <- file.path("..", "..", "resources", "plots")
table_base <- file.path("..", "..", "resources", "tables")

probes_path <- file.path(plot_base, "probes", paste0(clean_name, "_probe_counts.png"))
go_complex_path <- file.path(plot_base, "go", paste0(clean_name, "_go_complexity.png"))
go_entropy_path <- file.path(plot_base, "go", paste0(clean_name, "_go_entropy.png"))
kegg_complex_path <- file.path(plot_base, "kegg", paste0(clean_name, "_kegg_complexity.png"))
kegg_entropy_path <- file.path(plot_base, "kegg", paste0(clean_name, "_kegg_entropy.png"))

go_complex_table_path <- file.path(table_base, paste0(clean_name, "_go_complexity.html"))
go_entropy_table_path <- file.path(table_base, paste0(clean_name, "_go_entropy.html"))
kegg_complex_table_path <- file.path(table_base, paste0(clean_name, "_kegg_complexity.html"))
kegg_entropy_table_path <- file.path(table_base, paste0(clean_name, "_kegg_entropy.html"))
msig_complex_table_path <- file.path(table_base, paste0(clean_name, "_msig_complexity.html"))
msig_entropy_table_path <- file.path(table_base, paste0(clean_name, "_msig_entropy.html"))

go_complex_clusters_table_path <- file.path(table_base, "clusters", "go", paste0(clean_name, "_go_clusters.html"))
go_entropy_clusters_table_path <- file.path(table_base, "clusters", "go", paste0(clean_name, "_go_entropy_clusters.html"))

# Are we producing these plots?
# msig_complex_path <- file.path(plot_base, "msig", paste0(clean_name, "_msig_complexity.png"))
# msig_entropy_path <- file.path(plot_base, "mish", paste0(clean_name, "_msig_entropy.png"))

safe_include_image <- function(path, width = "75%") {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    knitr::include_graphics(path)
  } else {
    cat(glue::glue("⚠️ Plot not available.\n\n"))
  }
}

safe_include_html <- function(path) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    cat(paste(readLines(path, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n"))
  } else {
    cat(glue::glue("⚠️ Table not available.\n\n"))
  }
}

```

::: {.panel-tabset}

### `r comparison` Overview

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Probes
> -   **Cancer Category:** `r cancer_category_label`
> -   **Chip hu35ksuba**: `r count_35k` filtered probes
> -   **Chip hu6800**: `r count_6800` filtered probes

```{r probe_image, echo=FALSE}
safe_include_image(probes_path)
```

#### Summary Assessment

**Overall Complexity & Entropy Assessment**

| Measure | All Filtered Probes | GO MF Terms | KEGG Pathways | HALLMARK Genes |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Complexity** | `r fmt_summary(summary_all, "complexity_strength_label", "complexity_confidence_label")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_go, "complexity_strength_label", "complexity_confidence_label")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_kegg, "complexity_strength_label", "complexity_confidence_label")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_msig, "complexity_strength_label", "complexity_confidence_label")` |
| **Shannon Entropy** | `r fmt_summary(summary_all, "strength_label_shannon", "confidence_label_shannon")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_go, "strength_label_shannon", "confidence_label_shannon")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_kegg, "strength_label_shannon", "confidence_label_shannon")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_msig, "strength_label_shannon", "confidence_label_shannon")` |
| **Spectral Entropy** | `r fmt_summary(summary_all, "strength_label_spectral", "confidence_label_spectral")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_go, "strength_label_spectral", "confidence_label_spectral")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_kegg, "strength_label_spectral", "confidence_label_spectral")` | `r fmt_summary(summary_msig, "strength_label_spectral", "confidence_label_spectral")` |

::: {.callout-note}
**Interpretation Guide**

- **Gain** = Increased complexity from normal to tumor
- **Loss** = Complexity reduction from normal to tumor
- **Chaotic** = Increased entropy from normal to tumor
- **Anti-Chaotic** = Entropy reduction from normal to tumor
- **P-values** = All p-values unadjusted unless noted
:::

:::

### GO Biological Process Clusters

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Complexity Change

```{r go_bp_complex_clusters, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
safe_include_html(go_complex_clusters_table_path)
```

#### Spectral Entropy Change

```{r go_bp_entropy_clusters, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
safe_include_html(go_entropy_clusters_table_path)
```

:::

### GO Molecular Function Terms

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Complexity Change

**Significant GO Molecular Function Terms (Complexity)**

```{r go_complexity_plot, echo=FALSE}
safe_include_image(go_complex_path)
```

```{r go_mf_terms_complexity, echo=FALSE, results = 'asis'}
safe_include_html(go_complex_table_path)
```

#### Spectral Entropy Change

**Significant GO Molecular Function Terms (Spectral Entropy)**

```{r go_entropy_plot, echo=FALSE}
safe_include_image(go_entropy_path)
```

```{r go_mf_terms_entropy, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
safe_include_html(go_entropy_table_path)
```

:::

### KEGG Pathway Analysis

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Complexity Change

**Significant KEGG Pathways (Complexity)**

```{r kegg_complexity_plot, echo=FALSE}
safe_include_image(kegg_complex_path)
```

```{r kegg_pathways_complexity, echo=FALSE, results = 'asis'}
safe_include_html(kegg_complex_table_path)
```

#### Spectral Entropy Change

**Significant KEGG Pathways (Spectral Entropy)**

```{r kegg_entropy_plot, echo=FALSE}
safe_include_image(kegg_entropy_path)
```

```{r kegg_pathways_entropy, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
safe_include_html(kegg_entropy_table_path)
```

:::

### HALLMARK Genes Analysis

::: {.panel-tabset}

#### Complexity Change

**Significant HALLMARK Genes (Complexity)**

```{r msig_pathways_complexity, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
safe_include_html(msig_complex_table_path)
```

#### Spectral Entropy Change

**Significant HALLMARK Genes (Spectral Entropy)**

```{r msig_pathways_entropy, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
safe_include_html(msig_entropy_table_path)
```

:::

### Latent Geometry

**Latent-space normal-versus-tumor summary**

Latent-space metrics are computed from the VAE representation using samples derived from the **hu35ksuba** platform only. These quantities summarize within-class geometric structure and separation between normal and tumor states in the learned latent space.

```{r latent_geometry, echo = FALSE}
# Assume `latent_tbl` is already available in the environment
# and contains one row per comparison

current_comparison <- comp_data$comparison[[1]]

if (is.null(latent_tbl)) {

  cat("⚠️ Latent-space metrics are not available.\n")

} else {

  latent_row <- latent_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(comparison == current_comparison)

  if (nrow(latent_row) == 0) {

    cat("⚠️ Latent-space results are not available for this comparison on the hu35ksuba platform.\n")

  } else {

    latent_display <- tibble::tibble(
      Measure = c(
        "Participation ratio",
        "Eigenvalue entropy",
        "Anisotropy",
        "Radius",
        "Centroid distance"
      ),
      Normal = c(
        latent_row$pr_normal[[1]],
        latent_row$eig_entropy_normal[[1]],
        latent_row$anisotropy_normal[[1]],
        latent_row$radius_normal[[1]],
        latent_row$centroid_distance[[1]]
      ),
      Tumor = c(
        latent_row$pr_tumor[[1]],
        latent_row$eig_entropy_tumor[[1]],
        latent_row$anisotropy_tumor[[1]],
        latent_row$radius_tumor[[1]],
        NA
      ),
      Delta = c(
        latent_row$pr_delta[[1]],
        latent_row$eig_entropy_delta[[1]],
        latent_row$anisotropy_delta[[1]],
        latent_row$radius_delta[[1]],
        NA
      )
    )

    knitr::kable(latent_display, digits = 3)
  }
}
```

:::
